entries.text: Press a button to assign this action
The connection to the game server was lost. <?errorHandling?>
Frame rate unsuitable for online play. <?errorHandling?>
Failed to connect to Epic Online Services (<?errcodeEOS?>). <?errorHandling?>

Failed to save game. Save data is corrupted.
Select "Yes" to try again.
Select "No" to return to title menu without saving.

Failed to save game. Save data is corrupted.
Returning to title menu.
Failed to save game. Save data is corrupted.
Left session due to an extended period of inactivity <?errorHandling?>

Switching to offline mode.
To go online please return to the title menu.
An error has occurred. Closing results.
Closing result history and switching to offline mode.

Switching to offline mode.
The results of this Deep of Night session will not affect rating.
To go online please return to the title menu.
Text includes unsupported characters. Unsupported characters will be replaced with asterisks (*).
Please check your settings. One or more keys are bound to more than one function.
One or more keys are bound to more than one function. Leave menu without saving settings?
Some keys cannot be bound to menu functions. Please check settings.
Restoring button settings to defaults. Proceed?

Returning to title menu to join team session. Joining session will sacrifice current progress.
Proceed?

Returning to Roundtable to join team session. Joining session will sacrifice current progress.
Proceed?
Returning to title menu to join team session. Leave menu without saving settings?

Returning to Roundtable to join team session. Joining session will sacrifice current progress.
Proceed?

Closing tutorial and returning to title to join team session. Proceed?
N.B. Tutorial can be resumed later.

Closing tutorial to join team session. Proceed?
N.B. Tutorial can be resumed later.
No game progress data. Withdrawing from team session.
Could not join as team session is already at capacity
Could not join as team session has already been disbanded

Could not join team session as calibrations are out of date.
Please return to the title menu to update to the latest set of calibrations.
Could not join team session as expedition has already departed
Dialog must be closed to join team session
Unable to join team session as you are currently in multiplayer

At the end of the previous session, Return to Title Menu or Return to Desktop might not have been selected from the System menu.
Please use either of these options when you wish to end your play session.
Failure to end session using either of these options may result in loss of progress.
Failed to create save data. Select "OK" to try again.
Failed to load save data. Select "OK" to try again.
Failed to save game. Save data is corrupted.
The save data is corrupted. Delete corrupted data and create a new save?
The game version and save data version are different. Quit the game and use the Steam client to update game data to the latest version before trying again.
Logging in to the game server...
Retrieving data from the game server...
Saving data to the game server...

Starting in offline mode.
To use network features, check to see if your connection is set up properly, and select "LOG IN" from title menu.
Online connection is required to play ELDEN RING NIGHTREIGN Network Test Ver. Returning to title screen.
Unable to connect to the network. Please check your network settings.
New downloadable content has been installed. You must return to the title menu to apply this content in-game. Select "OK" to return to title menu.

Unable to start in online mode due to a detected frame rate issue.
Please restart the game after resolving the issue to play online.
A connection error occurred. Unable to start in online mode.
A connection error occurred. Returning to title menu.
Connection to Epic Online Services failed: <?errcodeEOS?> Unable to start in online mode.
Connection to Steamworks failed: <?errcodeSteam?> Unable to start in online mode.
Connection to Epic Online Services failed: <?errcodeEOS?> Returning to title menu.
Your profile is currently not permitted to access game server services.
Failed to log in to the game server. Select "OK" to attempt to log in again.
An update to the game is available. To use network features, please install the update and restart the game.
Cannot log in to the game server because it has been temporarily disabled or is undergoing maintenance.
Cheating detected on your account by Valve Anti-Cheat. You may no longer utilize services provided by the game servers.
Failed to acquire information. Select "OK" to try again.
Cannot create any more profiles. Delete an existing profile and create a new one?
Failed to load save data. Save data is corrupted.
Failed to initialize character info for online play.
Unable to restore current session as it has already ended.

Current session found. Press "OK" to restore session.
Declining may result in a temporary restriction on multiplayer functionality.
Unable to restore session. Press "OK" to attempt recovery again.

Unable to restore current session due to lack of internet connectivity. Switch to online mode to restore current session?
Starting in offline mode cancels the current session and may result in a temporary restriction on multiplayer functionality.

Unable to restore current session as it has already ended.
Returning to title menu.
Current session found. Press "OK" to restore session.

Unable to restore current session due to a multiplayer issue.
A penalty was incurred as there is evidence to suggest that an exploit that affects other players has been used.
An error has occurred. Returning to title menu.
Connection to Steam has been lost. Unable to commence expedition.
